checks.finding: Each REQ-001..REQ-006 resolves to concrete checkable conditions mapped to AC/TEST rows with observable pass/fail outcomes; no requirement is stated only as intent.
ACs specify externally checkable outcomes: guard decisions, exit-code contracts, byte-level encoding check, diff-fixture pass/fail; document-conformance rows name the artifact and absence condition.
Non-goals exclude table consolidation (SEC-15), a complete Bash interpreter, SDD_SUDO/kill-switch/WFI/contract changes, prompt/schedule rewrite, and a cross-model step on the lite track.

B1-B3 security table, human-only copy/approval (agent cannot write live protected paths, waiver needs a second distinct human approver), PS 5.1 ASCII, dispatcher fallback, and pinned action version are all stated.
Critical incomplete-.ps1-port -> AC-001/TEST-001 per-suffix parity; High cwd-tracking -> AC-003/005 read-only corpus. Both high-severity risks have a planned surface.
